race.comment: LADY THINKABELL (9) couldn't quite go with them in the Country Oaks at Ballarat but she stuck on well enough to finish midfield. This isn't as tough and she gets in lighter. Peaking now and is the one to beat. SOMEWHERE SOON (5) left herself with too much to do over a shorter trip last week but warmed into it late again. She'll appreciate rising in distance on the quick back up and Holder should be able to have her closer from the better draw. ALAINGE (4) closed off nicely into fifth in the G2 Adelaide Cup two back, then was forced to drop sharply in trip at Oakbank and still held her ground. Much better suited stepping back out and can play a major role. EMPRESS OF THE SUN (3) hasn't been beaten far in her last two and strips fitter fourth up. Where Allen lands from the gate will be key but she's one to monitor. CHOCOLATE ROYAL (2) bounced back sharply at Bendigo when just missing. She's at her top now and gets Toeroek, which keeps her in the mix.
